overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a light blue cape walking through a rainy industrial corridor with large storage tanks and pipes. The character encounters and passes other pedestrians in this atmospheric sci-fi urban environment with blue-toned lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with storage tanks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past large industrial storage tanks and red pipes in a covered corridor

entered.detail: massive cylindrical industrial tank with metallic grey finish and horizontal ridges
tall red industrial pipe with valve connections standing next to the storage tank
blue painted metal wall with weathered texture and industrial fittings
bright yellow rectangular crate or container sitting against the far wall
network of large industrial pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor lined with massive grey storage tanks and red pipes. The wet concrete ground reflects the dim overhead lighting as rain falls in the sheltered passageway.

events.description: passing from tank storage area into section with exposed machinery and metal railings

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor approaching distant figures visible ahead

entered.detail: complex metal machinery with pipes and valves positioned along the right wall
silver metal guardrail running along the right side of the walkway
dark wall with white graffiti markings and weathered paint

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the industrial complex, passing metal railings and machinery units. The corridor features graffiti-covered walls and opens slightly to reveal distant figures walking ahead.

events.description: two pedestrians approach from the right and walk past the character in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking forward as two pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking leftward pass by the character, one wearing a yellow shirt and the other a purple jacket

entered.detail: large metal ventilation fan or grille mounted on the blue wall
open metal door frame with red trim along the left wall
red painted metal handrail attached to the wall near the doorway

segments.scene_description: Two pedestrians emerge from the right and walk past the character, moving toward the left side of the corridor. The character continues past ventilation grilles and metal doorways along the blue industrial walls as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy industrial corridor that gradually opens up as the character encounters other pedestrians. It begins in a narrow passageway lined with massive grey storage tanks and red pipes, where the wet concrete reflects dim overhead lighting. As the character moves deeper into the complex, the space expands slightly to reveal graffiti-covered walls, metal railings, and distant figures ahead. The scene then shifts as two pedestrians emerge from the right to cross the character's path, before the camera continues past ventilation grilles and metal doorways along blue industrial walls under the persistent rain.
